description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have three jobs: flake8, unit-tests, and integration-tests, all running on ubuntu-latest. The flake8 job should check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install flake8, and run it on docker/ and tests/. The unit-tests job should set up different Python versions, install dependencies, and run unit tests with coverage. The integration-tests job should run integration tests for different variants.
